ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISCHANGED(StageName), ISNEW() ), Probability >= 0.25, RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Partnership', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Upsell')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Feature Update')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Monthly Cancellation')), !(Count_Tracking_Products__c >0 ), $Profile.Name != "Integration User No DF", $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps", $Profile.Name != "System Administrator1", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Wolves", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must add at least one product to the opportunity. To do that, click on the 'Product Tracking' button on the top left.
